name: Critical Payment Outage
alerts: Alert: Payment API response time > 3 seconds (SLA breach)
logs: 2026-06-14T12:03:01Z [WARNING] PaymentAPI: request response time 3450ms exceeds SLA
2026-06-14T12:04:12Z [ERROR] DBConnectionPool: Connection request timeout after 15000ms. Active: 100, Idle: 0, Max: 100
2026-06-14T12:04:15Z [ERROR] PaymentAPI: failed to get DB connection. Internal Server Error (500)
2026-06-14T12:05:00Z [CRITICAL] BillingService: Cascading failure. Downstream PaymentAPI unreachable.

historical_incidents.name: Database Pool Saturation
historical_incidents.resolution: Increased the database connection pool limit (Max Connections) from 100 to 250 in the helm charts and updated the pool timeout settings.
